calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Thomas A.E. Hesketh of the law offices of Thomas A.E. Hesketh (415-756-0335) makes a special appearance as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery, and for award of monetary sanctions is GRANTED. Good cause appears to exist for the requested relief, and defendant has filed no opposition to plaintiff's motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; An For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Off Calendar
